features: FAST HEALING: Masterplast Hyderocolloid Plasters create a protective cover to keep the wound moist, promoting faster healing. Moist healing stops hard scab formation which can reduce scarring
RELIEF: Apply at the first sign of rubbing to prevent blisters from forming or on existing blisters to relieve pain and promote healing
LONG LASTING: Providing long lasting gentle protection. Protective top layer with a hyderocolloid wound pad to protect from infection whilst the wound heals.
STERILE: Individually wrapped for safety, two sizes to suit a variety of sore spots and blisters. Box contains 5 plasters
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Box of 5 Plasters
description: Product Description Masterplast Hyderocolloid Blister Plasters create a protective cover to keep the wound moist, promoting faster healing. Moist healing stops hard scab formation which can reduce scarring. Apply at the first sign of rubbing to prevent blisters from forming or on existing blisters to relieve pain and promote healing. Providing long lasting gentle protection. Protective top layer with a hyderocolloid wound pad to protect from infection whilst the wound heals. Box of 5 Directions Apply at the first sign of rubbing to prevent blisters from forming or on existing blisters to relieve pain and promote healing. Protect the wound from infection while it heals.
